dimension_intent_groups.label: left and right end offsets
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: keep end-offset dimensions outside the long top view

dimension_intent_groups.label: hole diameter and center locations
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: keep DisplayDim hole dimensions in compact local lanes; right-side hole/thread text is handled by reference callout checklist

dimension_intent_groups.label: right-side projected view size and small-feature location
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: dimension the small projection without replacing it with a named view

dimension_intent_groups.label: radius/chamfer/thread callouts when detected
dimension_intent_groups.source_reference_rule: add only when geometry/reference notes prove the feature is present

source_reference_evidence.visual_reading: Thread callout near top view reads M4-6H 完全贯穿.

reference_callouts.create_as: SolidWorks hole/thread callout or attached manufacturing callout, not a substitute DisplayDim

ui_review_bucket_pass_conditions.dimension_visual_overdense: manual_visual_judgement must confirm the visible DisplayDim set is compact, readable, and matches the 12 reference-intent manufacturing targets.
ui_review_bucket_pass_conditions.dimension_lane_wrong: manual_visual_judgement must confirm leaders and text stay in compact local top/bottom lanes with no cross-region clutter.
ui_review_bucket_pass_conditions.note_missing_or_wrong: manual_visual_judgement must confirm manufacturing notes and roughness text match the reference note region.
ui_review_bucket_pass_conditions.titlebar_incomplete: manual_visual_judgement must confirm the title/data area uses only the compact reference-like fields.
ui_review_bucket_pass_conditions.projection_view_style_mismatch: manual_visual_judgement must confirm front/top/right/iso view scale and composition match the reference.
ui_review_bucket_pass_conditions.callout_missing: manual_visual_judgement reference_callout_checklist must prove required callouts are present and radius/chamfer callouts are not fabricated.

screenshot_visual_observations.manual_note: The final sheet still contains 24 visible DisplayDims, far above the 12 reference-intent target count.
screenshot_visual_observations.visual_fact: The generated sheet visibly keeps an over-dense dimension set around the main long-part view.
screenshot_visual_observations.reference_expectation: The reference drawing uses a sparse 12-target manufacturing dimension set.
screenshot_visual_observations.generated_failure: Extra length/offset/width/height dimensions remain visible and make the sheet read like AutoDimension output.
screenshot_visual_observations.repair_signal: After physical DisplayDim de-duplication, final export must keep only reference-intent manufacturing targets.

screenshot_visual_observations.manual_note: Dimension text, leaders, extension lines, and diagonal cross-region geometry dominate the drawing and reduce manufacturing readability.
screenshot_visual_observations.visual_fact: The generated drawing shows diagonal and cross-region dimension/extension geometry through the main view.
screenshot_visual_observations.reference_expectation: The reference drawing keeps dimension text in compact local lanes near the relevant view.
screenshot_visual_observations.generated_failure: Long leaders and diagonal extension lines dominate the central drawing area and reduce readability.
screenshot_visual_observations.repair_signal: Reject far-lane/cross-region placements and preserve compact top/bottom local lanes.

screenshot_visual_observations.manual_note: Manufacturing notes are present but still not formatted or placed like the reference note block.
screenshot_visual_observations.visual_fact: The generated note block is placed and formatted like generic technical requirements instead of the reference note region.
screenshot_visual_observations.reference_expectation: Reference notes and roughness text are compact and visually tied to the reference drawing layout.
screenshot_visual_observations.generated_failure: Manufacturing notes are present, but their placement and styling do not match the reference screenshot.
screenshot_visual_observations.repair_signal: Use the reference-style note region and keep roughness/manufacturing notes visually compact.

screenshot_visual_observations.manual_note: The title/data area remains positioned and formatted differently from the reference.
screenshot_visual_observations.visual_fact: The generated title/data area is visibly different from the compact reference-like fields.
screenshot_visual_observations.reference_expectation: The reference drawing uses a small, unobtrusive title/data area rather than a default template block.
screenshot_visual_observations.generated_failure: The title/data text appears sparse and displaced, so the sheet still fails the UI title-area check.
screenshot_visual_observations.repair_signal: Suppress default template artifacts and fill only compact reference-like fields.

screenshot_visual_observations.manual_note: View family is present, but view scale, visual organization, and dimension geometry do not match the compact reference drawing.
screenshot_visual_observations.visual_fact: The generated front/top/right/isometric composition and scale still differ from the reference screenshot.
screenshot_visual_observations.reference_expectation: The reference drawing keeps the small right projection and isometric view balanced with the long views.
screenshot_visual_observations.generated_failure: The generated right projection carries a separate cluttered dimension cluster and the view balance is off.
screenshot_visual_observations.repair_signal: Match reference view-family scale, small right projection footprint, and compact isometric placement.

screenshot_visual_observations.manual_note: Generated drawing still differs materially from the same-name reference: visible dimension density, diagonal/cross-region dimension lines, and title/notes placement remain non-reference-like.
screenshot_visual_observations.visual_fact: The latest screenshot does not independently close the required callout bucket.
screenshot_visual_observations.reference_expectation: The next UI screenshot must explicitly verify M4-6H, 4-3.3, Ra3.2, and radius/chamfer absence policy.
screenshot_visual_observations.generated_failure: Callout presence/absence cannot be accepted from API metrics or DisplayDim counts.
screenshot_visual_observations.repair_signal: Require a reference_callout_checklist in the next manual visual judgement.

ui_defect_bucket_closure_contract.ui_review_pass_condition: manual_visual_judgement must confirm the visible DisplayDim set is compact, readable, and matches the 12 reference-intent manufacturing targets.
manual_visual_judgement must confirm leaders and text stay in compact local top/bottom lanes with no cross-region clutter.
manual_visual_judgement must confirm manufacturing notes and roughness text match the reference note region.
manual_visual_judgement must confirm the title/data area uses only the compact reference-like fields.
manual_visual_judgement must confirm front/top/right/iso view scale and composition match the reference.
manual_visual_judgement reference_callout_checklist must prove required callouts are present and radius/chamfer callouts are not fabricated.
